name: Frontier Resources Limited
summary: Frontier Resources Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral properties. The company focuses on copper-gold-molybdenum porphyry and gold/silver epithermal deposits. It holds a 100% interest Tolukuma project covering an area of 441.72 square kilometers located in Central province 70km north of the Capital Port Moresby. The company was formerly known as TasGold, Ltd and changed its name Frontier Resources Limited in 2006. Frontier Resources Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Perth, Australia.
